name: Product & Marketing
description: For product and marketing teams coordinating initiatives, launches, campaigns, stakeholder feedback, and cross-functional delivery.

stakeholderRoles.label: Design Partner
stakeholderRoles.description: Customer or stakeholder co-developing an initiative

stakeholderRoles.label: Beta Tester
stakeholderRoles.description: Customer or user providing pre-release feedback

stakeholderRoles.label: Executive Sponsor
stakeholderRoles.description: Leader providing direction, budget, or launch approval

stakeholderRoles.label: Customer Advocate
stakeholderRoles.description: Customer participating in reference, case study, or launch validation

stakeholderRoles.label: Agency Partner
stakeholderRoles.description: External agency executing creative, media, or campaign work

internalTeamRoles.label: Engineering Manager
internalTeamRoles.description: Owns delivery planning and engineering execution

internalTeamRoles.label: Designer
internalTeamRoles.description: Owns UX, creative, or visual execution

internalTeamRoles.label: Campaign Manager
internalTeamRoles.description: Coordinates campaign execution and channel readiness

internalTeamRoles.label: Marketing Ops
internalTeamRoles.description: Owns automation, attribution, and reporting setup

dimensionGuidance.meeting_cadence: Evaluate whether discovery, delivery, campaign, and launch checkpoints are happening at the right pace.
dimensionGuidance.email_engagement: Read responsiveness from product, engineering, design, marketing, customer, and agency stakeholders as alignment signals.
dimensionGuidance.stakeholder_coverage: Assess coverage across PM, engineering, design, product marketing, campaign owners, ops, and customer voices.
dimensionGuidance.key_advocate_health: Assess whether a sponsor or design partner is clearing decisions and maintaining urgency.
dimensionGuidance.financial_proximity: Focus on expected business impact, launch timing, campaign budget, opportunity cost, and measurement readiness.
dimensionGuidance.signal_momentum: Weigh blockers, scope changes, creative readiness, beta feedback, launch readiness, and delivery confidence.

briefingEmphasis: Focus on initiative timelines, launch readiness, blockers, customer feedback, and cross-functional dependencies. Prioritize initiatives approaching launch with unresolved decisions or stakeholder misalignment.
